prompt: A clean lifestyle portrait for a social-media cover image: a stylish young East Asian woman with long wavy black hair sits on a light beige sofa in a bright pastel living room, wearing a light blue and white tweed jacket and matching skirt with pearl buttons over a white top. She holds both hands up in a presentation pose, palms flat and facing upward, as if supporting a floating rectangular profile card. The card is a large white creator-profile panel positioned above her hands on the left side of the frame, with 1 circular black-and-white avatar portrait, 1 bold display name reading Dan Koe, 1 handle line reading @DanKoeTalks, 1 stats line in Chinese showing subscriber and video counts, 1 short bio sentence reading If you want harsh truths, read my letters... 更多, 1 website link line reading letters.thedankoe.com followed by Chinese text indicating one more link, and 1 dark rounded subscribe button labeled 订阅. The woman faces the camera with a polished influencer aesthetic, her expression neutral and friendly. The composition is vertical, centered on her seated pose, with the profile card clearly legible and visually balanced over her hands. The background is softly blurred and elegant, with pale blue walls, geometric wall decor, a shelf with small plants, and soft natural daylight. High-end photography style, bright airy tones, Xiaohongshu cover design, minimal, premium, realistic skin and fabric texture, shallow depth of field.
